lesson.title: 1.6. THE BANTU SPEAKING PEOPLE
activities:  Discussing causes for movement of various Bantu Speaking groups into Zambia
RATIONALE: This lesson is on Bantu migrations into Zambia. The lesson will help learners
apply knowledge of the common origins of Zambian people to foster national unity and this
will done through group work, teacher exposition and question and answer. This is the third
lesson in the series of four.
PRIOR KNOWLEDGE: Learners already have knowledge about the origins of the Bantu
REFERENCES: Haantobolo, G. Junior Secondary History, pp. 22-25
resources: Document containing information explaining reasons for the Bantu migrations from
EXPECTED STANDARD: knowledge of common origins of Zambian people used to promote
